$comment: Equipment profiles catalog. Each franchise references a profile id; the page renderer pulls performance metrics + marketing claims from here. Generic fleet profile is the safe default for stores we haven't audited; premium profiles only get assigned when an owner or MHR confirms the store actually has that equipment. New profiles get added here when a store is verified with different equipment.

electrolux-mixed-fleet-default.label: Electrolux mixed fleet (default, unaudited)
electrolux-mixed-fleet-default.$source: Default profile derived from corporate template's brand-level claims (Electrolux fleet, 18-80 lb capacity range, 45 min full load). No store-specific UV / spin / cycle-time claims since corporate does not differentiate per store.

electrolux-450g-80lb-premium.label: Electrolux CompassPro 450G 80 lb (premium / Omni LUX UV)
electrolux-450g-80lb-premium.$source: Austin store profile, verified with owners. Electrolux CompassPro 80 lb washers with 450G high-extract spin, paired with the Omni Solutions LUX UV water sanitization system (hospital-grade, point-of-fill water treatment).
